statics.name: userAgent
statics.description: The User-Agent header sent with all HTTP requests.

functions.name: requestText
functions.description: Makes an HTTP GET request and returns the response as a String. Follows redirects automatically.

functions.name: requestBytes
functions.description: Makes an HTTP GET request and returns the response as Bytes. Follows redirects automatically.

functions.name: hasInternet
functions.description: Returns true if an internet connection is available by pinging Google.
